sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97952" key="sugku/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκύπτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n97952.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rafters</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sloping beams</tr_> of roof of engine, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:18:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.10</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
